subject: GPU Underutilization
body: My RTX 4090 is sitting at 15% utilization while the game runs at 40 FPS. CPU is barely touched either. Something is clearly wrong with the engine's resource scheduling — no other game does this.

subject: Memory Leak Over Session
body: Every hour the game is open, RAM usage climbs by about 2GB. After three hours I've hit 24GB and the whole system slows to a crawl. Restarting the client fixes it temporarily but it always comes back.

subject: Hard Crash on Alt-Tab
body: The game crashes to desktop every single time I alt-tab. No error message, no crash report — it just disappears. I can't run anything in the background while I play, which is a dealbreaker.

subject: Infinite Loading Screen at 98%
body: Loading into the lobby takes 4-5 minutes and sometimes I get stuck at 98% indefinitely. Everyone else in my party loads in fine. I've cleared the shader cache and verified files and it's still happening.

subject: Rubberbanding in High-Pop Zones
body: Every time I enter the main hub city, my character starts rubberbanding badly. My ping is a steady 28ms so it's not on my end. It only happens in crowded player zones, never in instanced content.

subject: Packet Loss on Ability Cast
body: I'm seeing 8-12% packet loss spikes that happen precisely when I cast high-cooldown abilities. It's consistent and fully reproducible. My connection is clean on every other application simultaneously.

subject: DirectX 12 Crash at Startup
body: Switching to DX12 mode crashes the game within 30 seconds of loading into a match. DX11 works but locks me out of the ray tracing features I paid for in the premium edition. DX12 should be functional.

subject: Anti-Cheat Blocking Launch
body: The anti-cheat driver is preventing the game from starting. I get error AC-1003 at boot. I'm not running any overlays or third-party programs and a full clean reinstall doesn't resolve it.

subject: DualSense Not Recognized
body: My PS5 controller isn't detected in-game despite showing up correctly in Windows and working in every other title. No button mapping, no haptic feedback — the game acts like nothing is plugged in.

subject: Mouse Input Lag
body: There's a consistent 50-80ms delay between physical mouse movement and in-game cursor response. It's not a hardware issue — the latency disappears entirely when I benchmark with other software.

subject: Keyboard Inputs Dropping Randomly
body: About once every few minutes a keypress just doesn't register — most often with movement keys. I've tried three different keyboards with the same result. This feels like a bug in the input buffer.

subject: Audio Crackling with USB Headset
body: There's constant crackling and popping through my headset only when this game is running. Switching the game's output to stereo mode reduces it but doesn't eliminate it. All other audio is fine.

subject: Voice Chat Echo to Teammates
body: My teammates can hear themselves echoed back through my mic even though I'm using headphones. The in-game voice settings have no noise suppression or echo cancellation options to fix this.

subject: Cutscene Audio 3 Seconds Behind
body: All story cutscenes are running with audio 2-3 seconds behind the video. Voice acting is completely out of sync with lip movements. It's been like this since the last patch and makes the story unwatchable.

subject: Missing Textures in DLC Zone
body: About 70% of the environment assets in the Ashveil Wastes DLC are rendering as flat purple or pink blocks. Looks like a shader compilation failure. I've forced a full shader rebuild and it's still broken.

subject: Shadow Cascade Artifact at Medium Range
body: There's a visible shadow cascade artifact around characters at about 20 meters. Big blocky shadow edges that look like an early 2000s game. It only appeared after the 2.4 graphics update.

subject: Resolution Locked at 1080p
body: The game is ignoring my monitor's native 1440p resolution and is capped at 1080p in fullscreen. My monitor is correctly set to 1440p in Windows and this is the only game with the issue.

subject: Ultrawide HUD Distortion
body: On my 32:9 ultrawide, the HUD and menus are stretched and distorted. The game renders at 21:9 but UI elements don't scale correctly to the wider format. The aspect ratio option is greyed out.

subject: DLSS Causing Ghosting on Moving Targets
body: DLSS Quality mode is creating severe ghosting around fast-moving characters and projectiles. It makes tracking targets in PvP nearly impossible. Reverting to native resolution fixes it completely.

subject: Ray Tracing GPU Timeout
body: Enabling ray tracing at any quality setting crashes the game with a GPU timeout error after exactly 2-3 minutes every time. Happens 100% of the time regardless of resolution or other settings.

subject: HDR Rendering Washed Out
body: With HDR enabled the game looks completely overexposed and washed out. No combination of in-game HDR settings fixes it. Every other HDR-enabled game on the same TV looks perfectly calibrated.

subject: Error 3007 Every 20 Minutes
body: I keep getting 'Error 3007: Session Expired' and getting booted to the main menu every 15-20 minutes. My internet is stable. It happens whether I'm in an active match or just idling in the hub.

subject: Login Queue Frozen for Hours
body: I've been sitting in a login queue at position 4,200 for over an hour without it advancing. Closing and reopening puts me at the back of a new queue. This has happened on three consecutive days.

subject: Cloud Save Overwriting Newer Progress
body: Every time I log in on my laptop, a cloud save conflict overwrites my desktop save with an older version. I've lost about six hours of progress twice this week because of this.

subject: Launcher Not Starting After OS Update
body: After updating to Windows 11 24H2, the launcher opens but the game never starts. The process briefly appears in Task Manager and then disappears with no error message displayed.

subject: High Latency Only During Peak Hours
body: My ping jumps from 30ms to 200-400ms every evening between 6pm and 10pm. Off-peak hours are perfect. Connecting to a different regional server during peak hours confirms this is server-side.

subject: Matchmaker Ignoring Region Setting
body: The matchmaker keeps placing me in East Coast servers even though I'm locked to West Coast in settings. My ping is 90ms instead of 20ms and it's directly costing me ranked games.

subject: Disconnect Before Reward Screen
body: The game consistently disconnects me right as a match ends, before the XP and reward screen loads. I'm not receiving any end-of-match rewards even though my participation is clearly registered.

subject: DRM Validation Failure on Launch
body: Getting 'DRM validation failed — please verify your license' on every launch since the patch. I've reinstalled the launcher twice and re-verified files. My license is valid. I played fine yesterday.

subject: VSync Makes Game Unplayable
body: With VSync on I have extreme input latency that makes the game feel like I'm playing through wet concrete. Without it there's severe screen tearing. Neither state is actually playable right now.

subject: Shader Compilation Freezing Mid-Session
body: Every time I enter a new map area, the game freezes for 30-45 seconds compiling shaders. This should happen at startup, not mid-match. It's caused me to miss critical teamfight windows.

subject: Client Crashes on Second Character Slot
body: The client crashes to desktop specifically when I click my second character slot. My main loads fine. I've been unable to access that character for three days with no change after reinstalling.

subject: FPS Cap Ignoring Settings
body: The game is capping me at 60 FPS even though I've set the limit to 165 in graphics options. The cap persists even after deleting the config file and letting the game regenerate it fresh.

subject: Fatal Error on GPU Driver Crash
body: When my GPU driver crashes and Windows falls back to integrated graphics, the game throws a fatal error instead of gracefully handling it. I lose my entire session's data with no recovery option.

subject: Microphone Not Detected In-Game
body: The game refuses to detect my Blue Yeti even though Windows and every other application sees it fine. I've set it as the default in all audio settings. The in-game test produces zero input signal.

subject: Account Flagged for Normal Farming
body: My account got flagged for 'suspicious activity' but I was just farming the Thornwood dungeon for six hours straight for the weekly event. I have continuous video proof of the entire session.

subject: Password Reset Email Not Arriving
body: I've requested a password reset email five times over two days and nothing has arrived. I've checked spam, promotions, and every folder. The email address on the account is definitely correct.

subject: Account Compromised, Items Missing
body: My account was accessed without my permission. Three legendary items are gone, my gold balance is cleared, and my character is in a different server. I need an immediate freeze and full rollback.

subject: Authenticator Lockout After Phone Change
body: I lost access to my authenticator app when I switched phones. The account recovery form keeps rejecting my backup codes as invalid even though I've never used them before. I'm completely locked out.

subject: Charged Twice for Battle Pass
body: My payment method was charged twice for the Season 7 battle pass. I only have one pass on the account but two charges hit my card on the same day. I need one transaction refunded immediately.

subject: Battle Pass Purchase Not Granted
body: I purchased the Inferno Season pass three hours ago, funds are gone from my account, but the pass still shows as 'Purchase' in-game with no receipt or indication the transaction processed.

subject: Purchased Skin Missing from Collection
body: I bought the Chromatic Wyvern skin last night but it's not in my collection. The purchase appears in my transaction history and my gem balance was deducted. The skin just isn't there.

subject: Level Boost Token Consumed But No Levels
body: I activated my character level boost from the Deluxe Edition. The token was consumed from my inventory but my character is still at level 1 with no levels granted.

subject: Refer-a-Friend Reward Missing
body: My friend hit the required level 20 two days ago and my referral dashboard shows their progress as complete. I still haven't received the Ironclad mount reward that was promised for the referral.

subject: Region Transfer Request
body: I recently moved from NA to EU and want to transfer my account progress to an EU server for better latency. The support page says this is possible but I can't find where to actually initiate it.

subject: False Positive Macro Detection Ban
body: I was banned for suspected macro use but I play a micro-intensive class legitimately. My APM is genuinely that high — it's just my playstyle. I've never touched any automation or third-party software.

subject: Ban Appeal Unanswered for Weeks
body: I submitted a ban appeal three weeks ago and haven't received any response. My ticket number is REQ-447821. The ban reason on my account just says 'Terms of Service Violation' with zero elaboration.

subject: Name Change Not Reflecting In-Game
body: I used my free name change token but the new name isn't showing in-game or on the leaderboards. Other players still see my old username. It updated on the web account portal but nowhere else.

subject: 12 Hours of Progression Rolled Back
body: After last Tuesday's maintenance, about 12 hours of character progression was rolled back. My gear score dropped from 485 to 461 and I'm missing two dungeon completions from my history.

subject: Flawless Achievement Not Unlocking
body: I completed the 'Flawless Conqueror' challenge — no deaths across all five raid wings — and the achievement didn't pop. My entire party can confirm I didn't die once. I have no title and no reward.

subject: Season Reset Placed Too Low
body: The season soft reset placed me in Gold 2 but I ended last season at Platinum 1. My placement should be significantly higher. Several friends who ranked below me ended up above me after the reset.

subject: Guild Bank Stripped by Leader
body: Our guild leader stripped the entire guild bank and quit the game. We had materials worth millions of gold in there. Officer logs show everything was withdrawn by one account in a single session.

subject: Gifted Item Stuck in Limbo
body: A friend gifted me the Voidwalker armor set. They have a store confirmation and their gems were deducted. The gift hasn't appeared in my inbox or inventory after 24 hours.

subject: Platform Link Removed Without My Action
body: My PlayStation Network link to my game account was removed without my input. I can no longer access cross-save or cross-progression features. This happened immediately after the last patch.

subject: Legacy Account Migration Failure
body: The migration tool says my old launcher account migrated successfully, but my character history and inventory aren't showing on the new account. The migration appears to have completed with empty data.

subject: Email Verification Loop
body: Every login asks me to verify my email even though I've done it multiple times. It sends the email, I click the link, it says 'verified', and the very next login prompts me to do it all over again.

subject: Subscription Not Cancelled Despite Confirmation
body: I cancelled my monthly subscription two billing cycles ago and got a confirmation email. The subscription still shows 'Active' on my account page and I'm still being charged every month.

subject: Parental Control Stuck on Adult Account
body: My account has parental restrictions from years ago on an old family account. I'm an adult and the master account email is no longer accessible. I need the restrictions removed with ID verification.

subject: ISP Traffic Flagged as VPN Proxy
body: My ISP routes traffic through nodes your system identifies as VPN or proxy. I don't use a VPN. This has triggered two security holds on my account in the past month from a completely legitimate connection.

subject: Cross-Platform Account Merge Request
body: I have two accounts — one on Steam, one on the standalone launcher — and want to merge them. Both have meaningful progression and I want to combine the best gear and characters from each into one account.

subject: Boss Grab Connecting Beyond Visual Range
body: The Ironveil Titan on floor 5 is landing grab attacks at distances clearly beyond the ability's visual range. Even at max kiting range with movement speed buffs active, the grab still connects. The hitbox is significantly larger than the telegraph.

subject: Headshots Registering as Body Shots
body: I'm landing clean headshots on stationary targets and seeing body-shot damage numbers. It's consistent and reproducible in the practice range. Hit registration appears to lag behind the visual by one frame.

subject: Character Clipped Into Terrain
body: My character clipped into a rock formation near the Shattered Pass waypoint and can't move. The unstuck command teleported me two feet and I'm still inside the same geometry with no escape.

subject: Mount Invisible After Dismount
body: After using a sprint mount ability and dismounting, my mount becomes completely invisible on subsequent summons. The riding animation plays but there's no mount visible until I fully relog.

subject: Fall Damage on Flat Floor
body: In a specific section of the Duskwood arena, my character takes full fall damage while walking over completely flat ground. No visible gap, no elevation change. Looks like a missing collision mesh.

subject: Execute Ability Not Firing Below Threshold
body: My Execute ability is supposed to activate on targets below 20% HP but it stays greyed out even when targets are clearly below the threshold. The tooltip shows the condition is met but the ability doesn't fire.

subject: Passive Kill Cooldown Reset Not Working
body: My passive 'Death's Bounty' should reduce my ultimate cooldown by 30 seconds on kill, but the tracker isn't moving. I've tested across multiple matches with clearly registered kills and zero resets.

subject: Support Going OOM Despite Regen Items
body: My mana hits zero mid-fight even with two high-tier mana regen items equipped. The regen rate on my stat sheet doesn't match what I'm actually recovering per second in combat. Something is miscalculating the stat.

subject: CC Chain with Zero Counterplay Window
body: Getting hit by a stun chains directly into a root, which chains directly into a knockup. By the time the last effect expires I'm dead without having moved once. The intended CC diminishing returns clearly aren't applying.

subject: Boss Randomly Dropping Aggro to Healers
body: During the Ravager Construct encounter, the boss randomly drops aggro from our tank mid-fight even while the tank spams every available taunt and threat ability. It then one-shots our backline immediately.

subject: Poison Debuff Ticking After Timer Expires
body: The poison debuff from the Venomspine Drake continues dealing tick damage for 5-8 seconds after the icon disappears and the timer hits zero. It's killed me twice after I thought I was safe to move.

subject: Projectile Phasing Through Enemies
body: My Void Bolt ability phases directly through enemies at certain angles. It shows a visual hit effect but deals no damage and the ability goes on cooldown anyway. Looks like a collision detection failure.

subject: Wall Clip Exploit on Ranked Map
body: There's a repeatable geometry clip on 'Iron Gate' ranked map where players can pass through the main barrier wall using a specific dash-and-crouch input sequence. I'm reporting it rather than exploiting it.

subject: Blink Landing Inside Walls
body: My Shadowstep ability frequently lands me inside walls and pillars when I blink toward a surface at a shallow angle. I get stuck and have to use the unstuck command, wasting the ability entirely.

subject: Auto-Attack Canceling Before Damage Frame
body: My basic attacks cancel their animation before the damage frame connects if I issue a move command even slightly early. The swing animation plays, the sound fires, but no damage numbers appear on the target.

subject: Parry Window Inconsistent by Enemy Type
body: The parry timing window feels completely different against human enemies versus beast enemies despite identical inputs. I can parry a bandit reliably but the same timing fails against wolf attacks every time.

subject: Dodge i-Frames Not Working Against Grabs
body: My dodge ability's invincibility frames aren't protecting me from grab-type attacks even while the dodge animation is clearly active. I can see myself rolling while simultaneously being grabbed and CC'd.

subject: Fighting Game Combo Dropping Online
body: The standing heavy into crouching medium combo drops after the first hit in certain matchups online. Training mode frame data shows it should be a true combo, but there's a gap that's being punished online.

subject: Crouch Spam Canceling All Recovery Frames
body: Rapidly pressing crouch cancels the end-lag of every animation including attacks. Players are dealing full damage with zero recovery time by crouch-spamming after each hit. This is clearly not intended behavior.

subject: Bunny Hop Velocity Randomly Resetting
body: The bunny hop mechanic isn't conserving velocity consistently. Sometimes full momentum carries through a jump chain perfectly, and sometimes the speed resets for no apparent reason at the exact same input timing.

subject: Ledge Grab Not Triggering on Certain Edges
body: The ledge grab system won't trigger on the outer edges of Skyfort map even though they share the same collision type as ledges that work elsewhere. I've fallen to my death on the same edge multiple times.

subject: Invisible Collision Wall Underwater
body: There's an invisible wall blocking progress at roughly coordinates 430, -120 in the Deepvault dungeon's underwater section. No geometry is visible there and my minimap shows a completely open path.

subject: Mobs Leashing Too Short in Open World
body: Enemies in Ashwood Wilds teleport back to spawn if kited more than about 15 meters. The leash distance is dramatically shorter than other zones and makes the content nearly unplayable as a solo melee player.

subject: Raid Elevator Stalling Midway
body: The elevator platform in Sector 7 of the raid stops at the midpoint and refuses to continue. The interaction prompt disappears and the only fix is a full wipe and reset. Happens on roughly 30% of our runs.

subject: Quest Trigger Prompt Not Appearing
body: The interaction prompt for the Altar of Embers in the 'Shattered Crown' quest never appears for me. I meet all prerequisites. Other players in the same zone can see and interact with it just fine.

subject: Escort NPC Pathfinding Into Walls
body: The escort NPC in 'Merchant's Run' walks directly into walls instead of following the road path. I have to physically herd them the entire route and they frequently get stuck in a way that soft-locks the quest.

subject: Aim Assist Magnetizing to Walls
body: The aim assist is magnetizing my crosshair toward environmental objects like walls and crates whenever enemies are near cover. It's actively dragging my aim away from the target and onto solid geometry.

subject: Recoil Pattern Changed Without Patch Notes
body: The Phantom-9 rifle's vertical recoil pattern changed significantly in 3.2 but there's no mention of it in the patch notes. Either it was an undocumented change or a bug — either way it's affecting my gunfight results.

subject: Hit Registration Failing at Range
body: Shots that visually connect at 50+ meters frequently show no damage registration, but other players hit me at the same distances without issue. I suspect my client is desyncing from the server during movement.

subject: Backstab Angle Detection Too Narrow
body: The backstab bonus isn't triggering even when positioned directly behind a target. The game seems to use a cone far narrower than the 180-degree arc shown in the ability description, making it nearly unusable.

subject: Stealth Detection Range Apparently Increased
body: Enemies are detecting me at much closer range than before. I could reliably stealth to within 8 meters of guards but they now aggro at around 15. There's no patch note mentioning any change to stealth detection.

subject: Knockback Launching Players Sideways
body: The Shockwave ability is launching players sideways instead of directly away from the cast direction. This makes it nearly useless for pushing enemies off ledges since the actual launch angle is completely unpredictable.

subject: Pet AI Ignoring Target Commands
body: My summoned companion is ignoring the enemy I'm attacking and targeting random mobs across the room instead. Both 'Assist' and 'Attack My Target' commands appear to do nothing since the pet behavior patch.

subject: Headshot Multiplier Not Calculating
body: I'm getting the headshot marker and sound but the damage number matches a body shot every time. Testing in the practice range confirms the multiplier isn't being applied. Headshot-boosting perks also aren't triggering.

subject: Vehicle Handling Floaty After Patch 3.1
body: All wheeled vehicles have handled completely differently since 3.1 — almost no weight or traction. Cornering that was previously reliable now sends the vehicle into an uncontrollable spin. Physics feel fundamentally broken.

subject: Crit Build Gutted by 4.2 Patch
body: The 30% base damage reduction to critical strike builds in 4.2 has made the entire glass cannon archetype nonviable in ranked. Tank specs are now out-DPSing my carefully optimized glass cannon build.

subject: New Legendary One-Shots Full Tanks
body: The Dawnbreaker Greatsword is one-shotting full-tank builds in PvP. Its passive completely bypasses armor mitigation and this has to be unintended. Every match is just whoever picks up the sword first winning.

subject: Mage Mobility Falling Behind Meta
body: Bruiser and assassin classes have received three mobility buffs over the last two patches while mages got nothing. We have zero escape tools and are being dove constantly with no counterplay option.

subject: Reworked Class Too Low-Effort for Reward
body: The Paladin rework requires almost zero mechanical investment while outputting top-tier damage and sustain. It removes the competitive skill differentiation between high and low-skill players in ranked lobbies.

subject: Crafting Material Drop Rate Feels Bugged
body: I've run the Ironveil Depths dungeon 47 times this week and haven't seen a single Starmetal Shard. Either the stated drop rate is wrong or the system is broken. The time investment for end-game crafting is unreasonable.

subject: DLC Weapons Causing Severe Power Creep
body: The Abyssal expansion weapons have a 35% power advantage over max-tier base game gear. The new passive effects stack in ways that make every piece of base game equipment completely obsolete in current content.

subject: Red Side Closer to First Objective
body: Red side consistently wins the first-objective contest because their spawn is measurably closer — roughly 8 seconds of travel time. The early advantage this creates snowballs predictably through the entire match.

subject: Healer Sustain Outpacing All Damage
body: At high item levels, healers are regenerating more HP per second than any damage build can output. Matches are being decided purely by which team has a healer rather than any skill expression. Healing scaling needs a hard cap.

subject: AoE Versus Single-Target Damage Gap
body: AoE ability builds deal about 3x the effective DPS of single-target builds in group content due to how the damage normalization works. Entire class archetypes are now undesirable for group content.

subject: Movement Speed Gap Too Decisive
body: The differential between the fastest and slowest classes is so large that mobility determines fight outcomes before any skill expression happens. Slow classes simply cannot disengage from or catch faster ones.

subject: Item Passive Synergy Zeroing Cooldowns
body: Combining the Void Mantle and the Shard of Eternity creates an unintended interaction that reduces all skill cooldowns to near zero. Players are spamming ultimates every few seconds in PvP and it's completely breaking ranked.

subject: CC Duration Has No Diminishing Returns
body: Crowd control effects are lasting their full base duration at all stages with no diminishing returns applied. A two-player CC chain can hold a single target for a full 8 seconds, which is an effective death sentence in any mode.

subject: Shield Stacking Has No Cap
body: Multiple shield abilities from different sources stack additively with no cap. Coordinated teams are stacking enough shields on one player to make them essentially unkillable for 20-30 seconds, which completely breaks objective play.

subject: Stealth Duration Exceeds All Reveal Abilities
body: Stealth ability duration is longer than the maximum duration of any available reveal skill. It's impossible to pre-emptively counter a stealthed player — they can simply wait out any detection attempt without breaking stealth.

subject: Sniper Scope Engagement Range Too High
body: The 8x scope gives snipers such a pixel-target advantage at range that they're effectively fighting at a completely different engagement distance than any counter-sniper class can match. The gap needs to be brought in.

subject: Melee Unviable in Ranked for Two Seasons
body: Ranked lobbies are running five-ranged compositions because melee has no engage path against coordinated kiting. Picking melee in ranked is actively throwing. The meta has been this way for two full seasons with no changes.

subject: Late-Game Respawn Timer Too Long
body: A 90-second respawn timer in final-phase ranked eliminates a player for 10-15% of remaining match time. One death shouldn't functionally remove a player from the endgame. There needs to be a soft cap on late-game respawn scaling.

subject: Starting Zone Too Hostile for New Players
body: Enemy density and aggro radius in the first two zones is far too high for players still learning the basics. New players are overwhelmed before they understand core mechanics and it's clearly driving early churn.

subject: Comeback Mechanics Fail at Large Lead Gaps
body: The comeback gold system is mathematically too slow to matter once a team reaches a 5,000 gold lead. Matches beyond that threshold feel predetermined. The catch-up mechanics need to scale harder at extreme lead gaps.

subject: LP Gain/Loss Asymmetry at 55% Win Rate
body: I'm losing 28-32 LP per loss but only gaining 14-18 LP per win at a sustained 55% win rate. The system is pushing me down regardless of performance. This doesn't reflect actual skill relative to my rank.

subject: Early Economy Snowballs Too Fast
body: A single first-blood trade creates a gold differential that compounds fast enough to make comebacks nearly impossible. The first 5 minutes determine roughly 80% of match outcomes, which kills any sense of a full-session arc.

subject: Undergeared Item Prices After Economy Patch
body: Since the economy rework, some items are massively underpriced relative to their power. The Thornweave Cuirass costs the same as basic armor despite being best-in-slot for almost every melee build in the game.

subject: Pet Basic Attacks Dealing Unintended Splash
body: Summoner-class pet basic attacks are now dealing AoE splash damage that wasn't mentioned in any patch notes. This is letting summoner builds clear content dramatically faster than any other class archetype.

subject: DoT Stacking From Same Caster
body: Applying the same Bleed ability twice from one caster is stacking additively instead of refreshing. This lets a single player double their effective DPS by quickly cycling the ability twice, which is clearly unintended.

subject: Tank Mitigation Too Binary
body: Tank mitigation is either full immunity or effectively nonexistent depending on a single threshold. There's no middle ground, creating extreme feast-or-famine combat where gear score matters far more than skill.

subject: High-Level Players Camping Starter Respawn
body: A group of max-level players has been camping the respawn point in Ashvale Crossing for hours, killing new players on spawn. I've watched three people in my group quit the game because of it.

subject: Teammate Feeding After First Wipe
body: Our support intentionally fed enemies for 10 straight minutes after we lost our first teamfight. They ran directly into enemy spawn repeatedly. I have full match replay data showing this was clearly deliberate.

subject: Racial Slurs in Post-Match Voice
body: A player used repeated racial slurs in the post-match voice lobby. I have an audio recording. Their username is in the attached screenshot. This needs an immediate account review and action.

subject: Suspected Stream Sniper Following Sessions
body: This player has appeared in my lobby six separate times across different sessions only during my stream. Each time they immediately rotate to my position before I've made any visible callouts. The pattern is undeniable.

subject: AFK Ranked Player Farming Rewards
body: Our ADC queued ranked, went AFK in the fountain from minute one, and returned at the end just to collect end-of-match rewards. The AFK detection missed them because they moved periodically. We lost LP for this.

subject: Coordinated Queue Dodging to Force Lobby
body: A group of players is coordinating to dodge champion select repeatedly until they land a lobby composition they want. They're exploiting the dodge penalty cooldown window to avoid significant punishment.

subject: Deliberate Destruction of Team Structures
body: A player destroyed our own base structures intentionally because they disagreed with our strategy. They stated this explicitly in chat. Screenshots are attached showing the full chat log and building event log.

subject: Post-Block Harassment Via New Account
body: After I blocked a player in-game they created a new account and resumed harassment through private messages. I have screenshots of all messages. The block system needs to extend across accounts from the same owner.

subject: Coordinated False Report Campaign
body: A rival guild is using the in-game reporting system to mass-report our members. Several of our players have received automated warnings from large volumes of false reports filed in a short window. This is organized griefing.

subject: Auto-Ban System Weaponized Against Competitive Players
body: I received an automated warning after being mass-reported by players I beat in a match. I haven't violated any rules. The auto-ban system is being used as a griefing tool to punish competitive play.

subject: Player Impersonating GM in Chat
body: A player with a display name nearly identical to the official support username is messaging players claiming to be a GM and asking for account credentials. Please warn the community and action this account immediately.

subject: Personal Address Threatened in Match Chat
body: A player posted what they claimed was my home address in match chat after I outplayed them. Whether it's accurate or not, this is a threat. I've saved the full chat log and can provide the session ID on request.

subject: RMT Boosting Advertised in Trade Channel
body: Multiple accounts are openly advertising real-money ranked boosting services in the global trade channel for days now. This is clearly against the terms of service and there's been no visible moderation response.

subject: Suspected Win-Trading in Ranked Queue
body: A group of players appears to be coordinating win-trading with a fifth account. Their match history shows an abnormal pattern of alternating wins and losses only against each other. This should be flagged algorithmically.

subject: Five-Stack Premade in Solo Queue
body: Full five-stack premade groups with voice comms are being matched into solo queue lobbies. The coordination advantage over unorganized solo players is too large to be considered competitive matchmaking.

subject: Win-Trading for Season Cosmetics
body: Two players in my match didn't attempt to play at all — they just alternated letting each other win to farm the season-end rank cosmetic reward. It's obvious from the replay. Both accounts should be reviewed.

subject: Spam Pinging Exceeding Rate Limit
body: A player spam-pinged the danger signal on teammates over 200 times in a single match. The ping rate limiter should have caught this. This level of signal spam makes it impossible to use the ping system at all.

subject: Hate Symbol Drawn with Paintbrush Tool
body: A player used the in-game paintbrush cosmetic tool to draw a hate symbol on their flag, which was visible to the entire server during the event. Screenshot with timestamp and display name is attached.

subject: Deliberate Communication Refusal in Ranked
body: A player typed 'muted' at the start of the match, refused all pings and callouts, played off-strategy, and actively subverted group decisions the entire game. This is deliberate non-participation in a team mode.

subject: Suspected Account Sharing in Ranked
body: A player in my ranked match alternated between wildly different skill levels mid-session, suggesting account sharing. Their early-game play and late-game play were completely inconsistent. This artificially inflates rank.

subject: Obvious Smurf in Low-Rank Lobby
body: This player has the game knowledge and mechanical skill of a high-rank player but their account is two days old. Smurfing destroys the experience for legitimate players trying to learn and improve in a fair environment.

subject: Repeated Deliberate Bait-and-Abandon Engages
body: A player consistently pings 'Attack' to bait teammates into 1v3 situations and then refuses to follow up. They've done this repeatedly across multiple matches when I've been grouped with them. It's a pattern, not a mistake.

subject: No Way to Leave Post-Match Voice Lobby
body: The built-in post-match voice lobby has no persistent mute or leave option. A group of players is using it to harass losing team players. I need an immediate exit or block option that persists for the full post-match period.

subject: Officer Stripped Guild Bank on Departure
body: An officer demoted themselves and withdrew all materials from the guild bank in a single 3-minute window before leaving. The audit log captures it all. We want the items restored and the account flagged for review.

subject: Organized Report Wave from Rival Faction
body: Our guild has been hit with a mass-report wave from a rival faction over the past 48 hours. Multiple members are receiving automated warnings from simultaneous false reports. We have logs showing the coordinated timing.

subject: Off-Tanks Diving Instead of Peeling
body: How do I communicate to our off-tanks that their job during teamfights is to peel for the carry and not dive the enemy backline? They keep engaging forward and leaving our ADC exposed to the enemy assassin.

subject: Rotation Speed Too Slow for Secondary Objectives
body: By the time our team rotates to contest a secondary objective, the enemy has already capped and reset. Should we be splitting responsibilities across the map differently or is there a better way to signal rotation timing?

subject: How to Break a Full Turtle Defense
body: The enemy team is running 4-5 players in their base with a full healing composition. We've had dominant map control for 20 minutes but can't close the game. What's the right approach for cracking a committed turtle?

subject: Stuck on Phase 2 DPS Check
body: Our raid team clears the add waves fine but always fails the Phase 2 damage check. Our gear score is at the recommended level. Is there a priority target order or specific positioning we're missing to pass the check?

subject: Team Running Out of Resources in Long Fights
body: Our group consistently runs dry in prolonged fights. We're running two DPS, one tank, and one healer. Should we replace a DPS slot with a second healer, or is the answer better cooldown management discipline?

subject: Farming Safely Against Poke Composition
body: The enemy lane is a heavy poke comp and I'm always below 50% HP before fights start. I can't all-in at low HP. How do I farm safely and maintain any meaningful lane pressure without getting poked out of lane?

subject: Countering a Five-Man Deathball
body: The enemy team runs a tight deathball that we can't split up. Every time we engage piecemeal we get wiped. What's the best approach for countering a composition that thrives on clustered group fighting?

subject: When to Split-Push Versus Group
body: Our team has a strong solo laner who wins every 1v1 but we keep grouping up and losing 5v5s. When is the right moment to commit to a split-push strategy instead and how do we signal and coordinate the timing?

subject: Vision Control Around Major Objectives
body: We keep getting caught by enemy rotations to objectives even when we think we have vision established. What's the optimal ward placement pattern around major objectives for reliable proactive vision control?

subject: Threat Priority with Mixed Aggro Group
body: Our main tank loses aggro on elite enemies to high-damage DPS every time cooldowns align. Should the off-tank immediately pick up those elites or wait for the main tank to re-establish threat? What's the standard priority call?

subject: Improving Macro Decision Speed
body: My micro mechanics are solid but my macro decisions are consistently too slow. By the time I've read the map state and decided to rotate, the window has already closed. What do high-level players focus on to process the map faster?

subject: How to Kite a Chasing Melee Properly
body: I play ranged and should be able to kite melee, but I keep getting caught. I'm clicking to move and trying to weave attacks in between. Is there a better movement technique for maintaining max range while dealing consistent damage?

subject: Converting an Early Gold Lead
body: When we get a significant early gold lead, how should we be spending it to maintain pressure? We keep winning early and then sitting on the advantage while the enemy farms back into the game instead of pressing it.

subject: Objective Swap Timing and Commitment
body: When is the right time to fake one objective to draw a trade on the other side of the map? We keep trying this but ending up with neither because we commit to the fake too long and get caught out.

subject: Breaking a Losing Teamfight Pattern
body: We lose the exact same teamfight pattern every game — engage, lose our frontline, get cleaned up. We've tried initiating with assassins instead of tanks but it still collapses. How do we identify and break the pattern mid-match?

subject: Legendary Chest Not Spawning on Flawless Clear
body: We completed a flawless clear of Grimspire Vault — all optional objectives, zero deaths — and the legendary chest didn't appear for two of our five party members despite identical completion status across the group.

subject: Daily Quest Board Not Refreshing
body: My daily quest board hasn't reset in 36 hours. The timer shows 0:00 but the same completed quests are still displayed. Other players in my guild are getting fresh quests on the correct daily schedule.

subject: Crafting Recipe Prerequisite Mismatch
body: The Emberveil Cloak recipe tooltip says it requires Journeyman Tailoring (Rank 4), but the crafting UI requires Artisan Tailoring (Rank 6) to activate it. The tooltip and the gate condition don't match.

subject: Skipped Cutscene Breaking Chapter 4 Progression
body: When I skipped a cutscene in the Chapter 4 questline, the completion flag wasn't set and the door to the next area won't open because the system thinks I haven't watched the sequence. I'm progression-locked.

subject: Side Quest NPC Not Spawning for My Account
body: The NPC for 'The Amber Shepherd' side quest isn't appearing at the marked location even though I meet the level and prerequisite requirements. Other players in the same zone can see and interact with the NPC just fine.

subject: World Event Kill Counter Stuck
body: I've killed over 400 enemies in the Siege of Thornwall world event but my event progress counter is frozen at 312. XP and gold from kills is still coming in normally, but the event tracker won't advance past that number.

subject: Prestige 5 Cosmetic Rewards Missing
body: I hit Prestige 5 and should have received the Obsidian Frame border and the exclusive nameplate. My prestige rank on the profile page shows correctly as Prestige 5, but neither cosmetic has appeared in my collection.

subject: Season Pass Skipping Reward Tiers
body: I'm at Season Pass level 47 but my collection only reflects the level 40 reward. Levels 41 through 46 appear to have been skipped in my unlock history. I'm missing six rewards from the track entirely.

subject: Tutorial Skip Permanently Locking Skill Nodes
body: I skipped the tutorial on my second character and two core skill tree nodes are now permanently locked. The unlock requirement shows 'Tutorial: Foundations Complete' — this is a character-level gate, not an account-level one.

subject: Heroic Boss Spawning Normal Mode Adds
body: The Ascended Harbinger encounter in Heroic difficulty is spawning the Normal mode add pool instead of the Heroic one. We're getting incorrect loot table drops for the difficulty tier we're actually running.

subject: Premium Skin Rendering at Wrong LOD
body: My Abyssal Knight premium skin switches to a blurry low-resolution model at close camera distances in third-person view. The base character model renders at correct quality at the same distance. I paid for this skin.

subject: Weapon Skin Reverting in First-Person
body: The Emberstrike weapon skin shows correctly in the lobby preview and third-person, but reverts to the default model in first-person view during gameplay. Every other weapon skin I own works correctly in first-person.

subject: Emote Clipping Through Shoulder Armor
body: The 'Victory Lap' emote causes my character's arms to clip through the Ironguard Pauldrons during the animation. It's been like this since the armor was added and it makes the emote look broken in any screenshot.

subject: Armor Dye Resetting on Relog
body: I applied a custom dye to my armor set and it looks correct in-game, but every time I log out and back in, it resets to the default color. The dye is consumed from my inventory but the change doesn't persist.

subject: Seasonal Bundle Missing After Event Ended
body: I purchased the Frostfall Festival bundle during the event window. The gems were deducted and the purchase is in my transaction history, but the cosmetics aren't in my collection and the event has since closed.
